results.title: NVIDIA (NVDA) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026 $NVDA

summary_raw: Last upgrade Oct 15, 2025: HSBC raised PT to $320. No downgrades on record. 37-analyst Buy consensus as of May 1, 2026. $275.25 current consensus PT. Last rating action March 31, 2026: reiterated with $250 PT.
